title: Venezuelan Oat Pilaf with Floral Notes
description: A German-inspired breakfast dish featuring a flavorful oat pilaf with hints of floral and Venezuelan flair. This hearty start to the day combines the comforting warmth of oats with the subtle sweetness of floral notes.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, bring the porridge to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and add the oats, velvety, floral, Venezuelan, salt, and cinnamon. Stir well.
Simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the oats have absorbed most of the liquid and have a creamy consistency.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
Optional: garnish with additional dried flowers or edible flowers for added flair.
